text:
H0300_URNRY_CNTNC_CD H0300 Urinary Continence Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's urinary continence level. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Always continent
1=Occasionally incontinent (less than 7 episodes of incontinence)
2=Frequently incontinent (7 or more episodes or urinary incontinence, but at least one episode of continent voiding)
3=Always incontinent (no episode of continent voiding)
9=Not rated, resident had a catheter (indwelling, condom), urinary ostomy,
